remaining_blockers: Promotion requires human review of regenerated requirement diffs.
Live crawl remains disabled; only dry-run metadata is cited.
Future handoff must cite rollback references and disabled live actions.
rollback_references: Remove the generated packet fixture and keep the previous PP&D fixture set.
Do not promote regenerated requirements until the offline intake cites pass validation.
Keep DevHub surface registry changes as candidates until a human approves live verification.
